message.content: =You are a research assistant for fiction writing.

=Research for a {{ $('get_genre_config').first().json[0]?.genre_name || $('get_genre_config').first().json.genre_name || 'fiction' }} novel about: {{ $('workflow_trigger').item.json.initial_concept }}. Themes: {{ $('workflow_trigger').item.json.themes }}. Provide historical details, scientific accuracy, cultural context, real-world parallels, and inspiration sources.

parameters.subject: =Story Outline: {{ $('save_outline').item.json.title }}
parameters.message:
={{ $('workflow_trigger').first().json.user_prompt ? '
Command: ' + $('workflow_trigger').first().json.user_prompt + '
' : '' }}

{{ $json.title }}

Premise: {{ $json.outline?.premise }}

Themes

    {{ ($json.outline?.themes || []).map(t => '
  • ' + t + '
    • ').join('') }}

Characters

{{ ($json.outline?.characters || []).map(c => '').join('') }}
NameRoleArc
' + c.name + '' + c.role + '' + c.arc + '

Section Outline

{{ ($json.outline?.chapters || []).map(ch => '
Section ' + ch.number + ': ' + ch.title + '
' + ch.brief + '
Arc: ' + (ch.arc_notes || '') + '
').join('') }}

assignments.name: result
assignments.value: =Story outline created for "{{ $('save_outline').item.json.title }}" with {{ ($('save_outline').item.json.outline?.chapters || []).length }} sections and {{ ($('save_outline').item.json.outline?.characters || []).length }} characters. Emailed and saved to writing projects.
